summary: Monetization Page (LLM Native Ads Demo) - All 12 requested features tested and verified. Page successfully replicates demoai.adsgupta.com monetization demo with article content, video ads, product carousel, AI chat floater, and live metrics.

issues: Emergent badge overlaps with AI chat floater causing click interception - requires force=True to bypass. Minor issue for demo purposes.

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements implemented correctly for demo purposes
AI chat responses are MOCKED (as documented) - no real LLM integration
Video ad countdown and skip functionality work correctly
Rotating text on chat floater cycles every 3 seconds as designed
test_credentials: No auth required - public demo page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monetization page fully tested. All features working: article content, video ads with skip, product carousel (6 products), AI chat floater with Neural Oracle branding and rotating text, inline native ads, AI prompt chips with emojis, live metrics panel, tags, save button toggle, and back navigation.
passed_tests: 1. Page renders at /monetization route - PASS
2. Header shows DemoAI logo and 'Back to Showcase Hub' button - PASS
3. Article title 'Myth: Coconut Oil Causes Weight Gain' displays - PASS
4. Hero image with 'Prototype by Ranjan' attribution visible - PASS
5. Video ad with 'Ad' badge, skip button (countdown), mute/unmute controls - PASS
- Skip button shows countdown (Skip Ad in 5s, 4s, 3s...)
- Skip becomes active after 5 seconds
- Video successfully skips when button clicked
6. Product carousel with 6 sponsored products and 'Buy Now' buttons - PASS
- All 6 products visible with prices, ratings, and Sponsored badges
- Carousel scroll arrows functional
7. AI Chat floater (Neural Oracle) visible with rotating text and AI badge - PASS
- Rotating text cycles: 'Dabur Coconut Oil 200ml', 'Coconut oil helps with weight loss', 'It's great for everything: skin, hair, diet', 'Ask My AI'
- AI badge visible on collapsed floater
8. Chat floater expands when clicked - PASS
- Shows 'Neural Oracle' heading with Bot icon
- 'Online' status indicator visible
- Input field with 'Ask My AI Anything...' placeholder
- Quick prompts visible (3 prompts with emojis)
9. AI prompt chips at bottom with emojis - PASS
- All 5 prompts visible with correct emojis (🤔, ✨, 🔥, 💚, 🥥)
10. Live Metrics panel showing Impressions (12.4K), eCPM ($8.20), CTR (3.2%), Revenue ($102) - PASS
11. Tags section with 'coconut oil', 'weight management', 'health myths', 'nutrition' - PASS
12. Save button toggles state when clicked (Save → Saved) - PASS
additional_verified_features: Native inline ad 'Discover More with AI' with Advertisement badge - PASS
Sponsored footer banner with 'AdsGupta AI' and Learn More link - PASS
Back to Showcase Hub navigation works correctly (/monetization → /showcase) - PASS

mocked_integrations.AI chat responses: MOCKED - preset responses returned after 1.5 second delay, no real LLM integration

design_review.overall: Industrial Luxury Tech theme correctly implemented
positives: Dark background with cyan accents throughout
Video ad styling consistent with demo requirements
Product cards have hover effects and proper sponsored badges
